query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.corretorId,
  u.name as corretor_nome,
  e.data as data_timestamp,
  DATE(e.data) as data_apenas,
  e.aceitouFollowUp,
  e.createdAt,
  NOW() as agora,
  DATE(NOW()) as hoje
FROM escolha_diaria_follow_up e
LEFT JOIN users u ON e.corretorId = u.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC;

  NOW() as agora,
  DATE(NOW()) as hoje
FROM escolha_diaria_follow_up e
